title: Nexus Local Creator Identity
description: Local-only creator identity for local_only mode. Supports anonymous (ephemeral) and persistent identities without platform dependency. See ADR-017, ADR-014.

creator_id.description: Local creator identifier (ctr_anon* for anonymous, ctr_local* for persistent)

display_name.description: User-chosen display name (optional for anonymous, recommended for persistent)

platform_linked.description: Whether this local identity has been linked to a platform Creator

platform_creator_id.description: Platform Creator ID after linking (null until linked)
